dealSummary: Fintech startup Ramp secured a $750 million Series F led by Iconiq, Singaporean sovereign wealth fund GIC and the Ontario Teachers' Pension Plan at a $44 billion valuation.
leadInvestors: Iconiq, Singaporean sovereign wealth fund GIC, the Ontario Teachers' Pension Plan

dealSummary: Fusion energy company Helion raised a $465 million Series G led by Thrive Capital at a $15.5 billion valuation.
San Francisco-based Collate, which develops tools to automate paperwork for life sciences companies, received a $95 million round led by Redpoint Ventures, Forbes reported.
CereVasc, a medical device startup developing treatments for neurological diseases, secured an $85 million initial closing for its Series C led by Piper Sandler Merchant Banking.
India-based quick-commerce grocery platform developer FirstClub raised a $55 million Series B led by Peak XV Partners and Sofina at a $255 million valuation.
Apoha, a London-based startup building AI models for creating new materials, raised $36 million in a round led by Singular.
London-based healthcare management startup Semble raised a £30 million Series C led by Revaia.
Paris-based restaurant technology startup Innovorder raised €20 million in a round led by UL Invest.
